notes: Nine liquid species and three volatile vapor species are documented.

5 of 5 constants are source-verified for thermodynamic-activity use.
R1-R5 have Austgen Table V constants on the unsymmetric mole-fraction activity H3O+ basis; equilibrium rows remain blocked by upstream solver support.
